---
title: "Lisa DeBruine"
---

Courses

* [The Research Cycle](research_cycle/)
* [Academic Webpages](acadweb/)

I also blog random things about R and Open Science.

* [rep()](rep.html)
* [scale()](scale.html)
* [coding schemes](coding.html)
* [pca](pca.html)
* [recode()](recode.html)
* [cumulative p](cumulative_p.html)
